Interface ReaderDao

All Known Implementing Classes:
ReaderDaoImpl
public interface ReaderDao
Data Access Object interface for the Reader entity.

All implementations must use PreparedStatement exclusively — never string concatenation — to prevent SQL injection.

Write operations (delete(int)) may throw a RuntimeException wrapping a foreign-key violation when the reader still has loans.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(int id)
    Deletes the reader with the given id.
    List<Reader>
    findAll()
    Returns all readers ordered by full_name ascending.
    Optional<Reader>
    findById(int id)
    Finds a single reader by its primary key.
    void
    insert(Reader reader)
    Inserts a new reader record.
    List<Reader>
    search(String text, LocalDate regFrom, LocalDate regTo)
    Dynamic multi-field search with optional date-range filter.
    void
    update(Reader reader)
    Updates an existing reader record identified by reader.getId().

  • Method Details

    • findAll

      List<Reader> findAll()
      Returns all readers ordered by full_name ascending.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot; never null

    • findById

      Optional<Reader> findById(int id)
      Finds a single reader by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the reader ID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the reader, or empty if not found

    • search

      List<Reader> search(String text, LocalDate regFrom, LocalDate regTo)
      Dynamic multi-field search with optional date-range filter.
      • text — case-insensitive LIKE match against full_name, email, and phone; ignored if blank
      • regFrom — reg_date >= regFrom; ignored if null
      • regTo — reg_date <= regTo; ignored if null
      Parameters:
      text - free-text search term; may be blank
      regFrom - lower bound for registration date; may be null
      regTo - upper bound for registration date; may be null
      Returns:
      matching readers ordered by full_name; never null

    • insert

      void insert(Reader reader)
      Inserts a new reader record. The id field is ignored; the generated key is assigned by the database.
      Parameters:
      reader - the reader to insert (fullName must be set)

    • update

      void update(Reader reader)
      Updates an existing reader record identified by reader.getId().
      Parameters:
      reader - the reader with updated fields; id must be valid

    • delete

      void delete(int id)
      Deletes the reader with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the primary key of the reader to delete
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the reader is referenced by one or more loans (foreign-key violation, SQL state 23503)
